reviews.review_description: Dont install this because i kept shooting what i was supposed to shoot and it kept saying your fired so since it kept doing that i rate this game 0/10

This game is the way VR games were meant to be played. The graphics are a specimen to lay your eyes upon especially in the VR 3D world. The gameplay however is on a whole other world with the incredible way of reloading which keeps the game exiting and keeps you on your feet. Also the way that each round  has randomised clothes to look out for adds another layer of excitement for you don’t know what happens next. Finally the incredible aspect of this game that you cannot write a review about if it is not included: the animations. They have obviously put so much hard work into these fun animations it is truly incredible. If you have not yet played the game then try it and you will see these glorious animations and you will understand what I mean. Thank you for your time and I hope you do try this game and I promise you that you will have a wonderful time and the fact that it is free means you might as well give it a go.
Accept you get to shoot them! Pew Pew! A tad dark, but that's okay. Kinda hard to play, I wasn't very good, but that's fine.

I love the backbeat music.  I was a little confused on what to do at first.   But once I sorted it out it was endless fun.  Really makes you think and focus.  The batteries running out mess with you a lot so be sure to change them between sessions and every now and then before they run out.

I honestly enjoyed the game for a while, but you can only do one thing in the game. gets boring after a while. The only thing you can do is shoot people who you need to shoot, nothing else. I do enjoy this game and think it has potential if there were different things to do. I would give this a 3 star, but I love the phone calls too much. 👍

developer_response.body: Glad you like the silly phone calls! Wish I had more help to flesh it out more, but I can't see anyone joining me to work on a free game. If you want to see something added let me know and I'll see what I can do about it.

reviews.review_title: Fun weird game that needs work
reviews.review_description: This is a fun neat little game where you have to act as a TSA agent on an alien planet. Pretty simple idea but the difficulty lies in making the right ID in time. With some work this game could be a fun time killer or a quick game of VR tsa when time is limited. This is the kind of game you can just hop in and play without much effort or training. I wish the dev the best of luck in making this game amazing.
I broke reality please add a girlfriend boss fight she sounds pissed
Kinda repetetive but i dont know what to do when i got the blue screen on the pc. Fun game tho.

developer_response.body: Thanks, that's what I was aiming for "Pretty Ok", lol. Seriously, it's just a silly little game that came to me when I was learning the Unreal Engine. The first version was a smartphone game. This is it's 4th incarnation as a VR game. The game ends with a Blue Screen because you can't get promoted higher then Ch*ck Norris. Nothing beats Ch*ck Norris. Reality breaks down. End of the world! Somebody divide Zero by Zero. Google googled Google. Cats and dogs, living together.

reviews.review_description:
You can see a video review here:
https://youtu.be/4kdYrNf93hY

It's a simple game, but I enjoyed it once I figured out what to do. I especially liked the silly way some of the passengers moved, and the human-made music and sound effects!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the promotion, that's really cool. You gotta answer the phone, I got alotta good jokes in those calls.

reviews.review_description:
Fun level- 6/10
Introduction- 4/10
Overall-3/10
Could be more but a good start.

I mean, interesting concept but it needs more in it. And the background sounds get annoying fast. yet I would still recommend you check this out.

Update: The game dev honestly made a good point, it is a free game and i could’ve been nicer. But I suggest, while still a free game, you should still add more.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive feedback! I had some ideas for some minor additions. A shootable PA speaker so people can stop the music, comes to mind.

reviews.review_description: It says what you should shoot but does not show you fix this it then would be a good game😇

developer_response.body: Look at the computer screen for the article of clothing that the paying passengers are wearing. When your taser runs out of power, get some fresh batteries, eject the old ones, and put the new ones in.
